description: Model a parametric 3D wheel hub adapter in SolveSpace with a 20.0 mm outer diameter and a 10.0 mm extrusion depth. The hub must feature a centered D-shaft mounting hole defined by a 5.0 mm diameter arc and a horizontal flat segment constrained 2.0 mm from the origin. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/d_shaft_hub.slvs.
